# Build normalization functions
import re
AR_DIACRITICS = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
TATWEEL = '\u0640'

def normalize_arabic(s):
    if s is None:
        return ''
    s = s.replace(TATWEEL, '')
    s = AR_DIACRITICS.sub('', s)
    # unify hamza forms
    s = s.replace('أ', 'ا').replace('إ', 'ا').replace('آ', 'ا').replace('ؤ', 'و').replace('ئ', 'ي').replace('ء', '')
    # remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    # normalize digits: arabic to ascii
    arabic_digits = '٠١٢٣٤٥٦٧٨٩'
    trans = str.maketrans(arabic_digits, '0123456789')
    s = s.translate(trans)
    # collapse whitespace
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

def ngrams(s, n=3):
    s = s.replace(' ', '')
    return [s[i:i+n] for i in range(max(0, len(s)-n+1))]

def lcs_similarity(a, b):
    # normalized longest common subsequence length / max len
    a2 = normalize_arabic(a)
    b2 = normalize_arabic(b)
    # Use difflib SequenceMatcher ratio as proxy
    return difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, a2, b2).ratio()

original_span = "دعا نوح لقومه 950 سنة، فلما فرغ منها قال: «أَتَدْرُونَ مَنْ يَدَعُ دِينَهُ وَيُشَيَّعُ النَاسَ عَلى هَذِهِ الْأَرْضِ؟» فَقَالُوا: «مَن ذَا يَزَعُ مِنَ اللَهِ؟» فَقَالَ: «وَلَوْ كُنتُ أُخِذَ بِالرَقَبَةِ وَأُفَضَّ عَنِ النَاسِ بِالرُزَقِ، لَمُذَكَرَ لَكُمُ"
snippet = "دعا نوح لق...َرَ لَكُمُ"

norm_original[:200], len(norm_original)

# Search hadiths for occurrences of 'نوح' and 'سنة' or 'الف سنة' or other tokens
def search_hadiths(query_terms):
    matches = []
    for h in hadith_data:
        text = h.get('hadithTxt') or h.get('Matn') or ''
        norm = normalize_arabic(text)
        if all(term in norm for term in query_terms):
            matches.append((h, norm))
    return matches

def best_match_in_texts(target, texts, key_getter=lambda x:x):
    best = None
    best_ratio = -1
    for item in texts:
        text = key_getter(item)
        if not text:
            continue
        r = lcs_similarity(target, text)
        if r > best_ratio:
            best_ratio = r
            best = item
    return best_ratio, best

# Best match among hadith Matn (prefers matn)
ratio_matn, best_matn = best_match_in_texts(original_span, hadith_data, key_getter=lambda h:(h.get('Matn') or ''))

ratio_ayah, best_ayah['surah_name'], best_ayah['ayah_id'], best_ayah['ayah_text']

# Additional direct search for segments present
def find_text_containing(arabic_phrase, in_hadith=True):
    norm_phrase = normalize_arabic(arabic_phrase)
    res=[]
    iterable = hadith_data if in_hadith else quran_data
    for item in iterable:
        text = (item.get('hadithTxt') or item.get('Matn') or '') if in_hadith else item['ayah_text']
        if normalize_arabic(text).find(norm_phrase)>=0:
            res.append(item)
    return res
